nasb.text: He sends forth His word and melts them; He causes His wind to blow and the waters to flow.

esv.text: He sends out his word, and melts them; he makes his wind blow and the waters flow.

cnv.text: 他發出命令，這一切就都融化； 他使風颳起，水就流動。

ccb.text: 祂一声令下，冰雪便溶化， 微风便吹拂，河川便奔流。

csbs.text: 他发出话语，使这些融化； 他使风吹动，水就流出。
